extDesc.message: Bilingual subtitles for YouTube — original and translation in one non-overlapping layer.

disclaimer.message: Not affiliated with YouTube or Google.

backendTipHtml.message:
Auto: uses YouTube's whole-track translation whenever the video supports it, and switches to smart sentences when it doesn't.
Whole-track: YouTube's own translation; aligned and never rate-limited.
Smart sentences: rebuilds fragmented captions into full sentences, then translates via Google's free endpoint — try it when the whole-track wording reads badly; heavy use may be briefly rate-limited, and the extension slows down and retries on its own.

backendGtxHint.message: Uses Google's free endpoint — heavy use may be briefly rate-limited; the extension paces itself and retries automatically.

backendStatusLimited.message: Rate-limited by the translation endpoint — slowing down and retrying automatically. Already-translated lines keep working.

posHint.message: Tip: you can also drag the subtitle box on the video

handleTitle.message: Drag to move · double-click to reset

handleAria.message: Drag to move subtitles, double-click to reset

exportNoTrans.message: No translation available for this video — try the Whole-track engine or another target language.

exportNoCues.message: No downloadable subtitles — play a few seconds so captions load, then try again.

exportNotYoutube.message: Open a YouTube video page to export.

exportFailed.message: Export failed — refresh the page and try again.
